title: FAMtastic Engagement / Invoice Spec
description: Input contract for billing.generate-invoice. Describes a single billable engagement (one-time project or recurring retainer). The generator computes line totals, subtotal, tax, grand total, invoice number, issue date, and due date from this spec. No payment provider is contacted.

engagement_id.description: Stable slug for the engagement, e.g. 'tonys-barber-shop-site'. Used to derive the invoice number when one is not supplied.

engagement_type.description: one_time = single project invoice. recurring = retainer; the generator stamps the billing period on the invoice.

site_tag.description: Optional FAMtastic site tag this engagement is tied to, e.g. 'site-tonys-barber-shop'.

vendor.description: Who is billing. Defaults to FAMtastic when omitted.

invoice_number.description: Explicit invoice number. When omitted, the generator derives one as FAM-<YYYYMM>-<engagement_id-or-client-slug>[-<period>].

issue_date.description: ISO date the invoice is issued. Defaults to today (UTC) at generation time.

billing_period.description: Required-by-convention for recurring engagements; stamped onto the invoice. Ignored for one_time.

unit.description: Unit label for the rate, e.g. 'month', 'hour', 'project', 'page'.

unit_price.description: Rate per unit in the invoice currency.

discount.description: Optional single discount applied to the subtotal before tax.

value.description: Flat amount in currency, or percent (0-100) when type=percent.

terms.description: Due terms. due_date is computed as issue_date + net_days unless an explicit due_date is given.

net_days.description: Days from issue to due. 0 = due on receipt.

due_date.description: Explicit due date; overrides net_days when present.

notes.description: Free-text terms note, e.g. 'Recurring monthly. Cancel anytime with 30 days notice.'

payment_instructions.description: How the client pays. Until a payment provider is chosen (PayPal vs Stripe vs GoDaddy), this is free text. Sending and online payment are manual_required.
